title: Cybersecurity and Post-Quantum Cryptology (BTK programme)
summary: BTK (Information and Communication Technologies Authority) news item on a programme themed 'Cybersecurity and Post-Quantum Cryptology', opened by the Minister of Transport and Infrastructure and BTK officials, stressing the importance of spreading quantum-resistant cryptography algorithms and studies in Turkey.

title: Quantum Technologies (TÜBİTAK BİLGEM research area)
summary: TÜBİTAK BİLGEM page describing its quantum technologies and quantum cryptography research. Institutional and domestic, but the page redirects to the BILGEM homepage and an explicit post-quantum cryptography reference could not be confirmed; flagged for human review.
